overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player approaching and entering a pharmaceutical kiosk constructed from shipping containers in an industrial urban market area. The player walks through the neon-lit interior, examining products and an NPC vendor within the tight container space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial market walkway with container shops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the pharmaceutical container shop entrance under the industrial canopy

entered.detail: blue shipping container converted into a shop with corrugated metal walls
glowing cyan neon sign reading 'PHARMACEUTICALS' above the entrance
rectangular neon sign with 'OPEN' in white letters
vertical advertisement poster with 'PURE OVERKILL' text
metal overhead beams and roofing providing partial cover

segments.scene_description: Walking through an industrial market area toward a blue pharmaceutical container shop. The environment features metal overhead canopies, concrete walkways, and glowing neon signage advertising the shop's open status.

scene_state.functional_zone: pharmaceutical container shop interior with security gate

events.description: passing through the metal security gate into the pharmaceutical shop
transitioning from natural daylight to artificial teal neon lighting inside the container

agents.ego_description: entering the shop through the security gate and approaching the vendor counter inside the narrow container space

notable_agents.action: standing behind the counter, visible through the metal gate, wearing a white shirt with 'PHARMACEUTICALS' text

entered.detail: vertical metal bars forming the entrance doorway to the shop
dark metal shelves stocked with pharmaceutical products and boxes
illuminated poster advertising 'ALL FOODS EEZY BEEF' with a burger image
vertical advertisement for Kiroshi optics on the left wall
tall white refrigeration unit in the corner of the container

segments.scene_description: Inside the narrow container shop, the space is illuminated by cyan neon signs and holographic advertisements. The vendor stands behind the counter as the camera enters through the security gate, transitioning from the industrial exterior to the enclosed retail interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: pharmaceutical storage area with product shelves

events.description: turning left to examine the product shelves along the wall, moving past the vendor

agents.ego_description: examining the pharmaceutical products on the metal shelves, moving around the tight interior space near the storage area

notable_agents.action: standing near the counter as the player moves past to examine the merchandise shelves

entered.detail: large red and white containers labeled 'CREATINE' on the lower shelf
black and yellow containers of protein supplements
stacked cardboard boxes on the floor near the shelving units

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the shop to examine pharmaceutical products on the shelves, including creatine and protein powder containers. The vendor remains near the counter as the camera explores the tight interior space, focusing on the merchandise storage area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sprawling industrial market into the cramped, neon-lit interior of a pharmaceutical kiosk. It begins by traversing concrete walkways beneath metal overhead canopies, guided by glowing signage toward a blue shipping container shop. As the camera passes through the security gate, the open industrial environment shifts into a narrow retail space saturated with cyan neon lights and holographic advertisements. The scene then pushes deeper into the enclosed container, moving past the vendor behind the counter to focus on pharmaceutical products and protein powder containers lining the shelves.
